chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1658 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7095/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.7096/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For orders on CMA No.7097/2023 (Stay/A) 5. For hearing of main case 15.11.2023 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 5. Petitioner claims to be a Bulldozer Operator working in the office of Director General, Agricultural Engineering Sindh, and also Chairman of Collective Bargaining Agent (CBA). He has challenged a notification dated 02.02.2022, whereby respondent No.7 has been assigned the charge of Agricultural Engineering Unit Salehpat of Sukkur Division. We have heard learned Counsel for petitioner. He has not succeeded in explaining as to why after more than one and half year of the issuance of notification, this petition has been filed, and what is illegibility therein. More so, he has not explained as to why petitioner has not approached the relevant authorities first, before directly filing this petition. Hence, this petition being non- maintainable is accordingly dismissed in limine along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
